name: datatalk
description: DataTalk — AI-powered conversational data analytics platform. Monorepo root that starts all three services.

scripts.dev: concurrently --names "frontend,backend,sidecar" --prefix-colors "cyan,green,yellow" "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm run dev --prefix backend-node" "./venv/bin/python sidecar/main.py"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix backend-node
